directions.evidence: Pupils, nose, and muzzle lift above the neutral head center; the chin and lower ruff recede.
The nose tip and visible pupil move to screen-right in an unmistakable right-facing profile.
The pupils, nose, and muzzle lower beneath the brow while the crown becomes more visible.
The nose tip and visible pupil move to screen-left in an unmistakable left-facing profile.
